text:

commit 37eb44cc9bb29b78ce13879e4f8d673f02524879
Author:     Alexey Dokuchaev <danfe@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-03-25 12:44:18 +0000
Commit:     Alexey Dokuchaev <danfe@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-03-25 12:44:18 +0000

    games/yquake2: new port had been added (Yamagi Quake II)

    Yamagi Quake II is advanced port of Icculus Quake II.  It uses SDL2
    and therefore can be run in Wayland without any additional tweaks.

    PR:     245770 (modified)
